ddls:
CREATE TABLE "file_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the file type (e.g., audio, video, image, database) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the file type (e.g., audio, video, image, database) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the file format (e.g., MP3, MP4, JPEG, PNG) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file format */,
  "mime_type" TEXT /* MIME type associated with the file format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file format was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file format was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_extensions" (
  "extension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file extension */,
  "extension_name" TEXT /* Name of the file extension (e.g., .mp3, .mp4, .jpg, .png) */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the file type */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the file format */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the extension is the primary extension for the file format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file extension was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file extension was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("extension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_extensions_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES file_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_extensions_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES file_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the program */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system(s) supported by the program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the file type */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the file format */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the program is the primary program for the file type or format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_associations_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES file_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_associations_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES file_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_associations_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_type_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the file type */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the file format */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the file type is the primary type for the file format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_type_associations_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES file_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_type_associations_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES file_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the file type */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the file format */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the file information was accessed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES file_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES file_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the file type */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the file format */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., file type usage, file format usage) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES file_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES file_types ("type_id")
)
